DelegationContext.description:
Carries a ``DelegationToken`` plus bilingual purpose strings for the permission UI.

Returned by verify adapters (except ``mock_verify_module_any_id_sso``).
Passed forward through the LLM's tool-call context to the next adapter.

citizen_did.description: Citizen DID if the verify ceremony surfaced one (e.g. 'did:web:mobileid.go.kr' issuance). Optional.
citizen_did.title: Citizen Did

purpose_en.description: English purpose statement shown in the permission UI.
purpose_en.title: Purpose En

purpose_ko.description: Korean purpose statement shown in the permission UI.
purpose_ko.title: Purpose Ko

DelegationContext.title: DelegationContext

DelegationToken.description:
Opaque, scope-bound, time-bound credential issued by a verify adapter.

In Mock mode the ``vp_jwt`` header is ``{"alg":"none","typ":"vp+jwt"}``;
the signature segment is the literal string ``"mock-signature-not-cryptographic"``.

Validators:
- ``expires_at > issued_at``
- ``scope`` matches the multi-scope grammar
- ``delegation_token`` starts with ``del_`` and has >= 24 chars after the prefix

_mode.description: Always 'mock' for Epic ε. Reserved for future 'live' value.
_mode.title: Mode

delegation_token.description: Opaque bearer token consumed by submit/lookup adapters. Must start with 'del_' and have >= 24 chars after the prefix.
delegation_token.title: Delegation Token

expires_at.description: UTC tz-aware expiry. Must be > issued_at. 24h max in Mock mode.
expires_at.title: Expires At

issuer_did.description: DID of the issuing verify adapter, e.g. 'did:web:mobileid.go.kr'.
issuer_did.title: Issuer Did

scope.description: Comma-joined list of scope entries, each matching '<verb>:<adapter_family>.<action>'. Single-scope is also valid.
scope.title: Scope

vp_jwt.description: Verifiable Presentation as JWS (header.payload.signature dot-separated). In Mock mode: header=base64({alg:none,typ:vp+jwt}), signature='mock-signature-not-cryptographic'.
vp_jwt.title: Vp Jwt

DelegationToken.title: DelegationToken

_OpaqueOutput.description: Generic envelope wrapper for bridge-registered tools' outputs.
_OpaqueOutput.title: _OpaqueOutput

description:
Typed params for the hometax tax return filing adapter.

Domain vocabulary lives HERE, not on the main SubmitInput envelope (SC-002).

delegation_context.description: DelegationContext from the prior verify step.

session_id.description: Consuming session ID (used for delegation session-binding check).
session_id.title: Session Id

tax_year.description: Tax year for the return (e.g. 2025 for 2025 income).
tax_year.title: Tax Year

title: mock_submit_module_hometax_taxreturn
